violations.text: Carrots and chicken were received at 109-125F. Food was brought back to be reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2025
Desserts were not adequately protected from contamination, as no sneeze guard or equivalent protective barrier was provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2025
Hot-hold unit located in the north concession was not in good repair. Per interview with PIC, unit is in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2025
Food contact surfaces of ice wells were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
